mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select (case when degree = 1 then '初中' when degree = 2 then '高中' when degree = 3 then '大专' when degree = 4 then '本科' when degree = 5 then '硕士' when degree = 6 then '博士' else '其他' end) name, count(1) value from student group by degree order by value;
select clazz.name clazzName, count(1) num from student left join clazz on clazz_id = clazz.id group by clazz_id order by num
